description: Internal goal setting and performance tracking portal with three user roles

escalation: System flags overdue submissions and approvals
Email sent to employee or manager

faqs.how_to_create_goals: Login as employee → My Goals in navbar → fill goal form → Save Draft → Submit for Approval when weightage = 100%
faqs.how_to_approve: Login as manager → Team Dashboard → click Review on submitted sheet → Approve & Lock Goals
faqs.how_to_checkin: Login as employee → Check-ins in navbar → enter actual values → Save
faqs.how_to_export_csv: Login as admin or manager → Reports → Export CSV button
faqs.how_to_create_user: Login as admin → Admin Hub → Create User button → fill form → submit
faqs.what_is_uom: Unit of Measure — Min (higher is better), Max (lower is better), Timeline (date-based), Zero (zero = success)
faqs.why_cant_edit_goals: Goals are locked after manager approval. Contact admin to unlock individual goals.
faqs.how_scores_computed: Min: actual/target, Max: target/actual, Timeline: completed on time = 100%, Zero: zero incidents = 100%
